before:
This Aosom bug netting for the backyard is the perfect gardening accessory to protect plants, fruits, and vegetables from various weather conditions. With this plant mesh tent, you can grow a variety of plants throughout the year and add green beauty to your backyard. The double large door design of the crop cage allows you to enter it at will to manage plants or simply open it for ventilation. What a wonderful experience to use the Aosom insect netting to manage plants.

Features:

  • • Suitable for plants, vegetables, fruits, and flower breeding
  • • HDPE cover can shade and prevent insects and birds
  • • Has good light transmittance and breathability
  • • The plug-in steel tube structure is easy to operate and strong
  • • 2 doors with zippers can be fixed at the top and are convenient for taking plants in and out
  • • Assembly required

Specification:

  • • Color: Black
  • • Material: HDPE Cover, Steel Frame
  • • Overall Dimensions: 94.5''L x 47.25''W x 72.75''H
  • • Door Size: 47.25''W x 72.75''H
  • • Windproof: Level 4 (wind speed below 17.5mph)
  • • HDPE: 80 g/㎡
  • • NOTE : To prolong its service life, you need to reinforce it yourself before bad weather

Package Includes:

  • 1 x Crop Cage;

before:
The Outsunny outdoor stair railing offers a versatile and secure solution for your outdoor steps. Designed to adapt to various heights and types of stairs, this railing combines style and functionality.

Key features:

  • Adjustable angle from 0-45° to adapt to heights up to 43 cm
  • Suitable for 1 to 3 steps or flat surfaces
  • Steel frame with non-slip, easy-to-clean powder coating
  • Elegant curved design that protects hands
  • Easy installation with included accessory kit
  • Compatible with brick, wood, concrete, or metal stairs
  • Ideal for porches, decks, patios, and gardens
  • Load capacity: 30 kg

Dimensions: 71 x 8 x 148 cm (at 45°)
Distance between posts: 41 cm
Maximum height: 43 cm

Perfect for improving the safety of the elderly, pregnant individuals, or those with reduced mobility. Free shipping within Canada!
